days.title: Arrival and direct transfer to Grindelwald
days.travelTime: About 2 hr 20 min–2 hr 45 min driving, plus arrival formalities
days.description: Land at Zürich Airport, collect the reserved car, and drive directly to Grindelwald. There is no Zürich sightseeing or Zürich hotel stay on arrival day.

locations.name: Zürich Airport
locations.description: Confirmed arrival airport and rental-car pickup point.
notes: Air Canada AC 880 is scheduled to arrive from Toronto at 10:05 local time.
Allow 60–90 minutes for immigration, baggage, and customs before the 12:30 car pickup.

locations.name: Budget rental desk
locations.description: Reserved Budget pickup at the Airport Centre car-rental center.
notes: Desk is on level 1 in the Airport Centre.
Bring the voucher, physical driver license, passport, flight ticket, and a physical credit card in the main driver's name.
Confirm the actual fuel or battery return rule at pickup.

locations.name: Eigerhome – The Cottage mit Wellness – GRIWA RENT AG
locations.description: Confirmed Grindelwald lodging for July 22–25.
notes: Check-in window: 16:00–17:00.
Free private on-site parking is listed; no reservation is needed.
Contact the property if the airport process delays arrival beyond the check-in window.

locations.name: Grindelwald village
locations.description: Low-effort groceries, dinner, and a short orientation walk near the lodging.

schedule.title: Arrive at Zürich Airport on AC 880
schedule.description: Confirmed arrival from Toronto; follow signs for passport control, baggage claim, and customs.
operationalNotes: Arrival is July 22; the imported OCR record previously assigned the wrong date.

schedule.title: Immigration, baggage, customs, and recovery
schedule.description: Use airport restrooms, refill water, and have a snack if the group needs it before driving.

schedule.title: Pick up the reserved Budget rental car
schedule.description: Inspect and photograph the vehicle, verify fuel or charge level, record damage, and confirm return instructions.

schedule.title: Drive directly to Grindelwald
schedule.description: Take the practical motorway route toward Bern/Interlaken and Grindelwald; stop only for food, fuel, supplies, restroom, or driver alertness.
schedule.transport: Rental car · approximately 2 hr 20 min–2 hr 45 min without a long stop

schedule.title: Check in at the Grindelwald cottage
schedule.description: Use the confirmed check-in window and on-site parking; notify the property if arrival is running late.

schedule.title: Groceries, easy dinner, and a light village walk
schedule.description: Keep the remainder of the day close to the lodging and prioritize hydration, food, and sleep.
schedule.transport: Short drive or walk based on energy

notes: Drive directly; Zürich is not the initial base.
Add a short motorway-service stop only if useful for food, fuel, supplies, restroom, or driver recovery.

operations.departureWindow: Leave the rental center after the confirmed 12:30 pickup, normally around 13:00–13:30.
parking: Rental pickup is in the Airport Centre.
The cottage lists free private on-site parking without a reservation.
meals: Late-morning airport snack if needed.
Flexible service-area food or grocery stop en route.
Easy dinner in Grindelwald around 18:30–20:00; no restaurant is booked.
restAndRecovery: Use airport facilities before starting the drive.
Stop immediately if the driver is drowsy after the overnight flight.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Low; allow extra driving time for heavy rain, roadworks, or mountain traffic.
reservationsAndTickets: Flight, rental car, and Grindelwald lodging are confirmed.
operations.physicalEffort: Low; arrival formalities, a long drive, and an optional short walk.
operations.fallbackPlan: If arrival or pickup is delayed, contact the cottage, skip the village walk, buy simple food near the route or lodging, and go directly to rest.

notes: Day 1 intentionally contains no Zürich sightseeing.
The rental is an intermediate SUV or similar; the exact vehicle and fuel type are assigned at pickup.
Phone numbers and confirmation codes remain in the private approved reservation record and Travel Pack.

days.title: Jungfraujoch high-mountain day
days.transport: Rental car, Eiger Express, and Jungfrau Railway
days.travelTime: About 10 minutes driving each way; about 50 minutes uphill by mountain transport
days.description: Use a clear-weather window for the Eiger Express and Jungfraujoch. Do not buy costly mountain tickets until visibility and operating status are acceptable.

locations.name: Grindelwald Terminal
locations.description: Eiger Express departure point with paid terminal parking and indoor facilities.
notes: Arrive before the reserved boarding window.
Check live operating status before leaving the cottage.

locations.name: Eigergletscher
locations.description: Transfer point between the 15-minute Eiger Express and Jungfrau Railway.

locations.name: Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe
locations.description: High-altitude complex with Sphinx views, Ice Palace, and indoor recovery areas.
notes: At 3,454 m, move slowly and descend if altitude symptoms worsen.
A valid ticket and a 2026 peak-season seat reservation are separate requirements.

locations.name: Jungfrau Eiger Walk
locations.description: Optional short high-alpine walk near Eigergletscher only in safe operating and trail conditions.

locations.name: Grindelwald indoor recovery plan
locations.description: Village café, sports center/pool, shopping, and cottage downtime without buying summit tickets.

schedule.title: Make the go/no-go decision
schedule.description: Check summit webcams, visibility, wind, operating notices, and every traveler’s energy before purchasing or activating tickets.
operationalNotes: Bad visibility is a reason to use the valley fallback and preserve the expensive excursion for another viable window.

schedule.title: Drive to Grindelwald Terminal and park
schedule.description: Allow time for parking, restrooms, ticketing, and the required turnstile buffer.

schedule.title: Eiger Express to Eigergletscher
schedule.description: Ride the Eiger Express and transfer to the Jungfrau Railway; follow the booked boarding instructions.
operationalNotes: Official guidance requires a valid ticket plus a separate seat reservation in the July 2026 peak period.
Pass the relevant turnstile at least 10 minutes before train departure.

schedule.title: Jungfraujoch summit complex
schedule.description: Prioritize Sphinx views when clear, then the indoor Alpine Sensation and Ice Palace; take frequent water and seated breaks.

schedule.title: Lunch and altitude recovery
schedule.description: Eat indoors at the summit or carry a simple lunch; avoid rushing immediately after arrival.

schedule.title: Optional short walk at Eigergletscher
schedule.description: Only add a signed short walk if trail, visibility, footwear, energy, and return timing are all suitable.

schedule.title: Return to Grindelwald
schedule.description: Descend via Eigergletscher and the Eiger Express, recover at the cottage, and choose an unhurried dinner.

notes: Use terminal parking; do not drive farther up the mountain route.
Use the live timetable and booked seat window.

operations.departureWindow: Target an early clear-weather departure; exact time depends on the purchased rail and seat-reservation window.
parking: Use Grindelwald Terminal parking and retain the ticket or app record.
meals: Breakfast before departure.
Carry water and snacks.
Lunch around 12:00–13:30 at the summit or packed; dinner after recovery in Grindelwald.
restAndRecovery: Restrooms are available at the terminal and summit complex.
Schedule seated breaks at altitude and move slowly.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Very high; summit cloud, wind, and visibility determine value and safety.
reservationsAndTickets: Jungfraujoch is not currently shown as booked.
A valid ticket and a separate timed seat reservation are required for July 2026; purchase only after the weather decision.
operations.physicalEffort: Moderate because of altitude, stairs, cold, and prolonged standing even though lifts and trains cover the ascent.
operations.fallbackPlan: Bad weather: do not buy or activate Jungfraujoch tickets. Use the Grindelwald village/sports-center plan, a café lunch, groceries, and cottage wellness/rest; reassess whether another day has a safe clear window.

notes: No mountain ticket is represented as confirmed.
The fast Grindelwald Terminal route is accessible; ask the operator in advance if mobility assistance is needed.

days.title: Lauterbrunnen, Mürren, and waterfall valley
days.travelTime: About 35–45 minutes driving each way, plus mountain transit
days.description: Explore Lauterbrunnen valley and car-free Mürren/Gimmelwald, with a separate optional via-ferrata track and a complete non-climbing family plan.

locations.name: Lauterbrunnen station car park
locations.description: Practical paid parking beside the station and Lauterbrunnen–Mürren valley transport.

locations.name: Staubbach Falls
locations.description: Valley waterfall visible from the village, with a short walking approach.

locations.name: Trümmelbach Falls
locations.description: Ticketed glacial waterfalls inside the mountain; verify seasonal opening and conditions that morning.
notes: Wet surfaces, stairs, spray, and loud enclosed spaces can be demanding.
Check age, accessibility, and current operating restrictions before going.

locations.name: Mürren
locations.description: Car-free mountain village for lunch, views, and easy village walking.

locations.name: Gimmelwald
locations.description: Small car-free village reached by cableway, optional if energy and timing allow.

locations.name: Mürren–Gimmelwald via ferrata
locations.description: Exposed one-way climbing route for separately qualified participants only; not a family default.
notes: Requires suitable ability, equipment, operating conditions, and any required guide or reservation.
Never assume all three travelers will participate.

schedule.title: Drive to Lauterbrunnen and park
schedule.description: Park once near the station, use restrooms, and confirm live mountain-transport operations.

schedule.title: Lauterbrunnen village and Staubbach Falls
schedule.description: Follow an easy village loop and view the falls; keep the pace flexible on wet paths.

schedule.title: Trümmelbach Falls if open and appropriate
schedule.description: Visit only if operating conditions, footwear, mobility, and the group’s comfort with stairs and spray are suitable.
schedule.transport: Local bus or short drive if moving the car

schedule.title: Ascend to Mürren
schedule.description: Use the live cableway/rail route from Lauterbrunnen or the Stechelberg cableway based on operations and parking plan.

schedule.title: Family plan: Mürren lunch, viewpoints, and optional Gimmelwald
schedule.description: Enjoy the village and waterfront-style terraces, then ride to Gimmelwald only if time and energy remain.

schedule.title: Separate via-ferrata track for qualified participants
schedule.description: Only a prepared subset may do the route; the rest of the family keeps the Mürren/Gimmelwald plan and agrees on a reunion point and deadline.
operationalNotes: Confirm equipment rental/guide availability and current route status in advance.
Do not attempt in rain, storms, poor visibility, or without appropriate experience.

schedule.title: Return to Grindelwald
schedule.description: Descend with ample margin, collect the car, use station restrooms, and drive back before a relaxed dinner.

notes: Allow extra time through Zweilütschinen and for parking queues.
Choose the live operating route; Mürren and Gimmelwald are car-free.

operations.departureWindow: Morning, ideally 08:00–09:00, adjusted to live waterfall and cableway operations.
parking: Use Lauterbrunnen station parking for a park-once plan.
If using Stechelberg instead, confirm live parking and cableway status before moving the car.
meals: Breakfast at the cottage.
Lunch in Mürren around 12:30–14:00; no restaurant is booked.
Carry snacks and water; dinner after returning to Grindelwald.
restAndRecovery: Use facilities at Lauterbrunnen station and during the Mürren lunch stop.
Skip Gimmelwald if stairs, wet surfaces, or transit transfers have used the group’s energy.
operations.weatherSensitivity: High for waterfalls, mountain views, cableways, and especially the via ferrata.
reservationsAndTickets: Waterfall and mountain-transit tickets are suggested, not booked.
Via ferrata is optional and needs separate operating/equipment/reservation confirmation.
operations.physicalEffort: Moderate for the family route; strenuous and exposed for the separate via ferrata.
operations.fallbackPlan: In poor mountain weather, keep to Lauterbrunnen village, Staubbach viewpoints, a long lunch, and an indoor Interlaken stop; omit Trümmelbach if conditions or accessibility are unsuitable and omit all climbing.

notes: The via ferrata is never assumed for the whole family.
Agree on a communication and reunion plan before anyone separates.

days.title: Grindelwald checkout, Lucerne, and transfer to Au
days.travelTime: About 1 hr 30 min to Lucerne, then about 45–60 min to Au
days.description: Check out of Grindelwald, make a measured Lucerne city stop, then continue to the confirmed Lake Zürich lodging without adding a mountain excursion.

locations.name: Lucerne station parking
locations.description: Central paid parking that supports a compact Chapel Bridge, Old Town, and lakefront loop.
notes: Use live signs and keep luggage concealed in the locked vehicle.
Choose another signed central garage if full.

locations.name: Chapel Bridge
locations.description: Lucerne’s landmark covered bridge on the compact walking route.

locations.name: Lucerne Old Town
locations.description: Historic squares and pedestrian lanes for a flexible walk and lunch.

locations.name: Lake Lucerne waterfront
locations.description: Low-effort lakefront pause near the station before continuing to Au.

locations.name: No1 Art B&B
locations.description: Confirmed Au lodging for July 25–29.
notes: Check-in window: 14:00–19:00.
Free private parking is listed; no reservation is needed.
The reservation records an approximate arrival of 14:00–15:00, which conflicts with the Lucerne stop and needs updating with the property.

schedule.title: Check out of the Grindelwald cottage
schedule.description: Complete the property checkout, load the car, and leave no later than the confirmed 10:00 deadline.

schedule.title: Drive to Lucerne
schedule.description: Use the practical route, allowing for weekend traffic and a brief restroom stop only if needed.

schedule.title: Chapel Bridge and Old Town loop
schedule.description: Walk Chapel Bridge and the nearby Old Town without adding distant attractions or steep climbs.

schedule.title: Lunch near Old Town or the station
schedule.description: Choose a convenient restaurant by neighborhood and wait time; no meal reservation is represented.

schedule.title: Short Lake Lucerne waterfront pause
schedule.description: Use this as the only optional extension and keep enough time for the drive and Au check-in.

schedule.title: Continue to Au
schedule.description: Retrieve the car and drive directly to No1 Art B&B; notify the property of the revised arrival estimate.

schedule.title: Check in at No1 Art B&B
schedule.description: Use the confirmed check-in window and private parking; the exact arrival within that window needs coordination because the booking notes 14:00–15:00.

schedule.title: Light Lake Zürich evening
schedule.description: Take a short local waterfront walk, buy any supplies, eat nearby, and settle into the new base.

notes: Weekend congestion can extend the drive.

operations.departureWindow: Leave Grindelwald by about 09:00–10:00 after the confirmed checkout; leave Lucerne by roughly 15:30–16:30.
parking: Use a signed central Lucerne garage near the station and note the level/space.
No1 Art B&B lists free private parking without a reservation.
meals: Breakfast before checkout.
Lunch in Lucerne around 12:30–14:00.
Easy dinner near Au after check-in; no restaurant is booked.
restAndRecovery: Station-area facilities in Lucerne provide a practical restroom stop.
Use the lakefront as a seated recovery break, not another major activity.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Low to moderate; use covered Old Town stops and shorten the waterfront in rain.
reservationsAndTickets: Lucerne activities are suggestions and require no represented reservation.
Tell No1 Art B&B that arrival will likely be later than the 14:00–15:00 note.
operations.physicalEffort: Low to moderate walking on mostly compact city streets.
operations.fallbackPlan: If traffic, checkout, or weather compresses the day, park once, see Chapel Bridge, eat lunch, and continue to Au; omit the extended Old Town and lakefront portions.

notes: This is a lodging-transfer day, not a mountain-excursion day.
Keep luggage out of sight and the car locked during the Lucerne stop.

days.title: Rhine Falls and Stein am Rhein
days.location: Au · Rhine Falls · Stein am Rhein
days.travelTime: About 50–65 minutes to Rhine Falls, 25–35 minutes onward, and 55–70 minutes back to Au
days.description: Arrive at Rhine Falls before the busiest midday window, then continue to Stein am Rhein for lunch and a measured Old Town visit.

locations.name: Schloss Laufen Rhine Falls
locations.description: South-bank paid parking, visitor center, and ticketed viewing-platform access.
notes: Rhine Falls itself is accessible around the clock; platform and boat operations have separate conditions.
Wet platforms and stairs may be slippery.

locations.name: Rhine Falls boat experience
locations.description: Optional seasonal boat experience only if operating and the group is comfortable with spray and boarding.

locations.name: Stein am Rhein signed visitor parking
locations.description: Use signed parking outside the pedestrian Old Town and walk into the center.

locations.name: Stein am Rhein Old Town
locations.description: Painted façades, Rathausplatz, lanes, and Rhine waterfront in a compact visit.

schedule.title: Drive from Au to Rhine Falls
schedule.description: Aim to reach the Schloss Laufen side around 09:00–10:00, before the busiest midday period.

schedule.title: Viewing platforms and waterfall circuit
schedule.description: Allow 90–150 minutes for viewpoints, photos, restrooms, and unhurried movement on steps and wet surfaces.

schedule.title: Optional operating boat experience
schedule.description: Add only if boats are running, queues are reasonable, and everyone is comfortable; it is not booked.

schedule.title: Drive to Stein am Rhein
schedule.description: Continue east, follow signed visitor parking, and walk into the pedestrian center.

schedule.title: Lunch in or near the Old Town
schedule.description: Choose by neighborhood and available seating; no restaurant reservation is represented.

schedule.title: Old Town and Rhine waterfront
schedule.description: Explore Rathausplatz and the riverfront for about 90–150 minutes without adding a distant excursion.

schedule.title: Return to Au
schedule.description: Use a restroom before departure and allow 55–70 minutes for the drive back to No1 Art B&B.

operations.departureWindow: Leave around 08:00–09:00 for a recommended 09:00–10:00 Rhine Falls arrival.
parking: Use the signed Schloss Laufen visitor parking and pay the current posted rate.
At Stein am Rhein, use signed visitor parking outside the pedestrian core.
meals: Breakfast in Au.
Snack at Rhine Falls if needed.
Lunch in Stein am Rhein around 13:00–14:30; dinner back near Au.
restAndRecovery: Use visitor-center restrooms before or after the platform route.
Take a seated lunch before the Old Town walk.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Moderate; rain increases spray and slipperiness and may stop boat service.
reservationsAndTickets: No attraction or boat booking is represented.
Viewing-platform and optional boat tickets are purchased separately according to current operations.
operations.physicalEffort: Moderate due to viewing-platform stairs and several hours of walking; accessible parking/view options exist but should be confirmed for individual needs.
operations.fallbackPlan: In heavy rain or poor boat conditions, skip the boat, shorten the platform circuit, have a longer lunch, and use a museum/café-focused Stein am Rhein visit before returning early to Au.

notes: Visit durations are estimates, not reservations.
Do not leave visible luggage or valuables in the parked car.

days.title: Zürich city day
days.transport: Train preferred; walking and tram in Zürich
days.travelTime: About 30–45 minutes each way depending on the selected Au station connection
days.description: Leave the rental car at the B&B and use regional rail for a compact Old Town, Bahnhofstrasse, church quarter, and lakefront day without city parking stress.

locations.name: Au ZH station
locations.description: Preferred rail origin for the Zürich city day; verify the live walking/parking connection from the B&B.
locations.address: Au ZH railway station, 8804 Au, Switzerland

locations.name: Zürich Hauptbahnhof
locations.description: Start and end point for the city walking route, with restrooms and food options.

locations.name: Bahnhofstrasse
locations.description: Pedestrian-friendly central avenue linking the main station and lake area.

locations.name: Zürich Old Town and Lindenhof
locations.description: Historic lanes, river views, and a compact overlook.

locations.name: Grossmünster and Fraumünster area
locations.description: Historic church quarter on both sides of the Limmat; interior access depends on current hours and tickets.

locations.name: Bürkliplatz and Lake Zürich
locations.description: Lakefront recovery stop with tram access back toward the station.

schedule.title: Train from Au to Zürich
schedule.description: Use the live ZVV/SBB connection; rail is operationally preferable to driving and paying for central parking.

schedule.title: Bahnhofstrasse, Lindenhof, and Old Town
schedule.description: Walk south from Zürich HB, detouring through Lindenhof and the historic lanes at a relaxed pace.

schedule.title: Lunch in Old Town or near the Limmat
schedule.description: Choose a casual option by neighborhood, menu, and wait time; this is a suggestion, not a reservation.

schedule.title: Grossmünster/Fraumünster quarter
schedule.description: Cross the river between the churches; verify same-day public access if anyone wants to enter.

schedule.title: Lake Zürich waterfront
schedule.description: Recover near Bürkliplatz, take an optional short tram segment, and keep the evening flexible.

schedule.title: Return to Au by train
schedule.description: Use the live connection from Zürich HB and eat near Au if the group prefers a quieter dinner.

notes: Check the live ZVV/SBB departure and fare before leaving.
Driving plus park-and-ride remains a fallback only if the Au station connection is impractical that morning.

operations.departureWindow: Morning, roughly 08:30–09:30; choose the exact live rail connection that day.
parking: Preferred: leave the rental car at No1 Art B&B and reach Au ZH station on foot, by local connection, or by a verified legal parking option.
Fallback: use an outer park-and-ride only after checking same-day capacity and restrictions.
meals: Breakfast in Au.
Lunch in Old Town/Limmat area around 12:00–13:30.
Coffee or snack near the lake; dinner in Zürich or after returning to Au.
restAndRecovery: Zürich HB is a reliable restroom/recovery anchor.
Use Lindenhof or the lakefront for seated breaks.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Moderate; the walking route can be shortened and connected by tram in rain or heat.
reservationsAndTickets: No city attraction or meal is booked.
Buy the appropriate ZVV fare and verify church opening/ticket rules if entering.
operations.physicalEffort: Moderate urban walking; tram segments can reduce distance.
operations.fallbackPlan: In sustained rain, use rail/tram between Zürich HB, a museum chosen that morning, covered Old Town arcades/cafés, and Bürkliplatz only if conditions improve.

notes: Rail avoids central driving, parking cost, and end-of-day fatigue.
All meals are neighborhood recommendations, not reservations.

days.title: Lake Zürich and flexible final full day
days.transport: Short train or drive, walking, and optional boat
days.travelTime: About 20–30 minutes each way to Rapperswil; limited regional travel
days.description: Keep the final full day near Au with Rapperswil, a Lake Zürich experience, optional pre-ticketed Lindt visit, and protected packing time.

locations.name: Rapperswil Old Town and waterfront
locations.description: Compact old town, lakeside promenade, and views with easy rail access from the Au area.

locations.name: Lake Zürich boat ride
locations.description: Optional scheduled cruise segment chosen from the live ZSG timetable without turning the day into a long transit exercise.

locations.name: Lindt Home of Chocolate
locations.description: Optional timed-entry museum in Kilchberg only if tickets and the day’s route fit comfortably.
notes: Do not travel there without checking timed-ticket availability.
Skip it if it would eliminate packing/recovery time or add excessive cross-lake driving.

locations.name: Au peninsula and Lake Zürich shoreline
locations.description: Local low-driving lake walk and recovery option near the B&B.

locations.name: No1 Art B&B packing block
locations.description: Protected time to pack, check flight status, and resolve the rental-return conflict.

schedule.title: Travel to Rapperswil
schedule.description: Prefer a short regional train so the group can avoid parking; use the car only if the live connection is impractical.

schedule.title: Rapperswil Old Town and waterfront
schedule.description: Explore the compact center and promenade with frequent lakefront breaks.

schedule.title: Lunch near the Rapperswil waterfront
schedule.description: Choose a casual venue by availability; no reservation is represented.

schedule.title: Optional Lake Zürich boat segment
schedule.description: Choose a practical same-day route from the live timetable; avoid a long cruise that crowds out packing.

schedule.title: Optional Lindt Home of Chocolate
schedule.description: Use only with a secured timed ticket and a simple rail/boat connection; it is not currently booked.

schedule.title: Return to Au for lake time and recovery
schedule.description: Use the local shoreline instead of more driving and begin departure preparation.

schedule.title: Pack and prepare for departure
schedule.description: Check AC 881 status, baggage, passports, fuel/charge instructions, rental paperwork, and the unresolved car-return-time change.
operationalNotes: The booked 12:00 rental return is too late for the 13:25 international flight; secure an earlier return time before departure day.

notes: Use the live 2026 timetable and preserve a straightforward return to Au.

operations.departureWindow: Flexible morning, roughly 09:00–10:00; protect the late afternoon and evening for departure preparation.
parking: If driving, use signed public parking and verify limits; do not combine driving across the lake with a long boat route.
meals: Breakfast in Au.
Lunch near Rapperswil waterfront around 12:00–13:30.
Simple dinner near Au while packing.
restAndRecovery: Use the Rapperswil station/waterfront as a restroom and seated-break anchor.
Return early enough for at least two hours of calm packing.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Moderate; boat operations and lake enjoyment depend on wind/rain, while Rapperswil and packing remain flexible.
reservationsAndTickets: No boat or Lindt booking is represented.
Lindt requires a timed ticket if selected; use the live ZSG timetable for any boat.
operations.physicalEffort: Low to moderate walking with multiple opportunities to sit; optional activities can be omitted.
operations.fallbackPlan: Wet-weather plan: skip the boat, use a pre-ticketed Lindt visit only if transit is simple, otherwise choose a nearby indoor café/museum stop and return to No1 Art B&B early for packing.

notes: Choose either the boat or Lindt unless timing is unusually favorable; do not force both.
Resolve the rental-return timing before going to bed.

days.title: Departure from Zürich Airport
days.transport: Rental car and confirmed Air Canada flights
days.travelTime: About 30–45 minutes driving to the airport before return and terminal processing
days.description: Check out, drive to Zürich Airport, return the rental car, and depart on confirmed Air Canada flight AC 881 at 13:25. The booked 12:00 car return must be changed or completed early to create a safe international-flight buffer.

locations.name: No1 Art B&B
locations.description: Confirmed final lodging with checkout allowed between 08:00 and 12:00.

locations.name: Airport-area fuel or charging stop
locations.description: Use only after confirming the assigned vehicle’s fuel/charge rule; exact stop depends on vehicle type and live availability.

locations.name: Budget return at Zürich Airport
locations.description: Reserved return location at the airport car-rental center; the 12:00 booked time is operationally unsafe for the flight.

locations.name: Zürich Airport departures
locations.description: Confirmed Air Canada departure airport for AC 881 to Toronto; terminal is not present in the approved record.

schedule.title: Check flight, terminal, and rental-return change
schedule.description: Confirm AC 881 status and terminal in the Air Canada/airport channels and verify the earlier Budget return arrangement.

schedule.title: Check out of No1 Art B&B
schedule.description: The property allows checkout until 12:00, but this itinerary requires a much earlier departure for the flight.

schedule.title: Leave Au for Zürich Airport
schedule.description: This recommended window derives from a 13:25 international departure, a target three-hour airport buffer, the drive, and vehicle return processing; it is not a booked time.
schedule.transport: Rental car · about 30–45 minutes plus fuel/charge stop

schedule.title: Restore required fuel or charge level
schedule.description: For a combustion/hybrid vehicle, replace used fuel under the like-for-like policy; for an EV, return at the required charge level stated at pickup. Do not guess the assigned vehicle type.

schedule.title: Complete rental-car return
schedule.description: Photograph the vehicle, record fuel/charge, collect the receipt, and walk to departures. This earlier operational target requires Budget confirmation because the voucher currently says 12:00.

schedule.title: Current reserved car-return time — unsafe conflict
schedule.description: The approved voucher says 12:00 at Zürich Airport. Do not use this time for a 13:25 international flight; change the booking or obtain explicit early-return instructions.

schedule.title: Airline check-in, baggage, passport control, and security
schedule.description: Aim to be in the terminal about three hours before departure; use any remaining buffer for food, restrooms, and gate changes.

schedule.title: Depart Zürich on Air Canada AC 881
schedule.description: Confirmed nonstop segment to Toronto, scheduled to arrive at 16:10 local time; terminal is not recorded and must be checked.

schedule.title: Connect Toronto to Raleigh-Durham on AC 8838
schedule.description: Confirmed onward flight scheduled to arrive RDU at 22:00 local time; follow Air Canada and YYZ connection instructions.

notes: Includes a conservative fuel/charge and traffic allowance.
Secure permission/booking confirmation for an earlier return than 12:00.
Times are local to their respective airports.
Times are local to their respective airports.

operations.endLocation: Air Canada AC 881 departing Zürich Airport
operations.departureWindow: Recommended 08:30–09:00 from Au, derived from the confirmed 13:25 departure; the window is operational guidance, not a reservation.
parking: Follow airport rental-return signs and Budget instructions obtained at pickup.
Do not plan any airport-area sightseeing or long stop.
meals: Eat breakfast before leaving or carry it.
Use the post-security airport buffer for an early lunch.
Carry snacks for the Toronto connection.
restAndRecovery: Use B&B facilities before departure and airport restrooms after return.
Preserve a calm terminal buffer for baggage/security delays.
operations.weatherSensitivity: Low, but heavy rain and traffic justify the conservative drive buffer.
reservationsAndTickets: No1 Art B&B checkout, rental return, AC 881, and AC 8838 are confirmed.
An earlier car return must be confirmed because 12:00 conflicts with the 13:25 flight.
operations.physicalEffort: Low to moderate with luggage handling and airport walking.
operations.fallbackPlan: If the earlier return cannot be confirmed, contact Budget and Air Canada immediately and use the safest authorized early-drop procedure; if road delays develop, skip the fuel stop only after obtaining supplier instructions and proceed directly to return.

notes: Departure timing is derived from approved flight and rental records.
Do not invent a terminal; verify it on July 28 and again on departure morning.
The reserved noon car return is an unresolved contradiction, not a recommended plan.

Confirmation and property phone remain in the private approved reservation record.

checklist.title: Verify all passports and expiration dates
Save all confirmations for offline access
Pack rental voucher, driver license, physical credit card, and coverage letter
Check weather before buying Jungfraujoch ticket and seat reservation
Update No1 Art B&B arrival estimate after Lucerne
Confirm earlier rental return for July 29 flight
Confirm AC 881 terminal and flight status
Pack rain protection and mountain layers

emergencyNotes: Keep passports, medications, payment cards, and phones in carry-on luggage.
Store emergency contacts and insurance details offline.
Use 112 for the general European emergency number.
At high altitude, descend and seek help if severe symptoms develop.
Do not place real passport numbers, PINs, or full payment-card information in the repository.
